database.models module¶

Database Models Module¶

This module defines the SQLAlchemy ORM models for the application, including the User and Contact entities and their relationships.

class database.models.Base(**kwargs: Any)[source]¶

Bases: DeclarativeBase

Base class for all SQLAlchemy models in the application. Uses DeclarativeBase from SQLAlchemy 2.x.

metadata: ClassVar[MetaData] = MetaData()¶

Refers to the _schema.MetaData collection that will be used for new _schema.Table objects.

See also

orm_declarative_metadata

registry: ClassVar[registry] = <sqlalchemy.orm.decl_api.registry object>¶

Refers to the _orm.registry in use where new _orm.Mapper objects will be associated.

class database.models.Contact(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Base

ORM model representing a contact entry in a user’s address book.

id¶

Primary key for the contact.

Type:

int

first_name¶

The contact’s first name.

Type:

str

last_name¶

The contact’s last name.

Type:

str

email¶

Unique email address for the contact.

Type:

str

phone¶

Phone number of the contact.

Type:

str

birthday¶

Date of birth of the contact.

Type:

date

additional_data¶

Miscellaneous notes about the contact.

Type:

str, optional

user_id¶

Foreign key linking to the owner of the contact.

Type:

int

user¶

Relationship object to the User model.

Type:

User

additional_data¶
birthday¶
email¶
first_name¶
id¶
last_name¶
phone¶
user¶
user_id¶
class database.models.User(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Base

ORM model representing a user of the application.

id¶

Primary key for the user.

Type:

int

username¶

The display name of the user.

Type:

str

email¶

Unique email address, used for authentication.

Type:

str

password¶

Hashed password string.

Type:

str

avatar¶

URL to the user’s avatar image.

Type:

str, optional

refresh_token¶

Token used to refresh the session.

Type:

str, optional

confirmed¶

Flag indicating if the email has been verified.

Type:

bool

created_at¶

Timestamp of when the account was created.

Type:

datetime

role¶

Role assigned to the user (defaults to ‘user’).

Type:

UserRole

contacts¶

Relationship back-reference to the user’s contacts.

Type:

list

avatar¶
confirmed¶
created_at¶
email¶
id¶
password¶
refresh_token¶
role¶
username¶
class database.models.UserRole(*values)[source]¶

Bases: Enum

Enumeration of available user roles within the system.

admin¶

Full access to the system.

user¶

Standard access to personal contacts.

admin = 'admin'¶
user = 'user'¶
